member.name: P:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.BiomeType
member.summary: Tells the Library what biome this is an alternative to

member.name: P:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.ManuallyDefinedConversionType
member.summary: Override this to return true and to return your conversion ID if you want to define your biome's conversion ID manually, such as if you

member.name: P:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.DisplayName
member.summary: The name of this biome that will display on the biome selection screen.

member.name: P:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.Description
member.summary: The description for this biome that will appear on the biome selection screen.

member.name: P:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.GenPassName
member.summary: The message that will appear during world generation. Used by Evil alts.

member.name: P:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.DryadTextDescriptor
member.summary: The descriptor the dryad will use when saying how much of the world is this biome

member.name: P:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.DryadWorldDescription
member.summary:
The quote the dryad will use when the world has a large amount of this biome
return null to use the vanilla quote

member.name: P:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.WorldEvilStone
member.summary: Used in NPC dialog

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.GetEvilBiomeGenerationPass
member.summary: Set this to something if for some reason you need RNG generation types or something

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.EvilBiomeGenerationPass
member.summary: Set this to something so your evil biome can generate

member.name: P:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.Biome
member.summary: For all biome types, only used used by AltLibrary if NPCsHate returns true, but should be overridden if a biome is associated with this biome

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.ShadowKeyAlt
member.summary: For Underworld alts. If your biome uses a different kind of locked chest than a Shadow Chest, set this field to your equivalent to a Shadow Key so that it may appear in the Dungeon

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.BiomeKeyItem
member.summary: For Any alts with a biome key, not used by AltLibrary, just here so other mods can use it (for example, making a boss have a chance of dropping the world evil's key)

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.BiomeChestItem
member.summary: For Jungle, Evil, and Hallow alts. The ItemID for the rare item that will be found inside this biome's dungeon chest.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.BiomeChestTile
member.summary: For Jungle, Evil, and Hallow alts. The TileID of the special biome chest which will generate in the dungeon.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.BiomeChestTileStyle
member.summary: For Jungle, Evil, and Hallow alts. The style number of the biome chest tile to be placed. Defaults to 0.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.BiomeOre
member.summary: For Jungle and Evil alts. The TileID of the biome's associated ore. For Jungle alts, this block will begin to appear during hardmode and slow down the spread of nearby evil biome blocks.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.BiomeOreBrick
member.summary: For Jungle and Evil alts. The TileID of the biome's associated ore brick. For Jungle alts, this block will slow down the spread of nearby evil biome blocks. For Evil alts, this is the block that will surround the loot of the Underworld boss. (WoF or Alt)

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.BiomeGrass
member.summary: For Jungle, Evil, and Hallow alts. The TileID of the biome's grass block, which will also spread to dirt in a 1 block radius. For Evil and Hallow alts, this is the block that grass blocks will be converted into. For Jungle alts, this will block will spread to mud instead of dirt.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.BiomeMowedGrass
member.summary: For Hallow alts. The TileID of the biome's mowed grass block. You can also use this field for Evil or Jungle alts if you desire to make the grass able to be mowed.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.BiomeMud
member.summary: For Jungle alts. The tile which will replace vanilla Mud.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.BiomeJungleGrass
member.summary: For Jungle and evil alts, since vanilla introduced evil jungle grass.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.BiomeThornBush
member.summary: For Jungle alts.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.BiomeMudWall
member.summary: For Jungle alts. The wall that replaces mud walls.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.BiomeJunglePlants
member.summary: For Jungle alts. The shortgrass that grows on the grass tile.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.BiomeJungleBushes
member.summary: For Jungle alts - the large 3x2 plants that grow in the jungle.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.BiomeShrineChestType
member.summary: For Jungle alts. Used in the shrine-like structure in the underground.

member.name: P:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.SpreadingTiles
member.summary: For Evil and Hallow alts. The list of tiles that can spread this biome. This should generally include the biomeGrass, biomeStone, etc blocks, but they can be omitted if you for some reason do not wish for those blocks to spread the biome.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.AltarTile
member.summary: For Evil alts, this is the TileID of this biome's equivalent to Demon Altars. For Underworld alts, this is the TileID of this biome's equivalent to Hellforges.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.BossBulb
member.summary: For Jungle alts, if you use a mechanic similar to Plantera's bulb, list the TileID of that tile here.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.BloodBunny
member.summary: For Evil alts, the NPCID of the creature Bunnies will turn into during a blood moon.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.BloodGoldfish
member.summary: For Evil alts, the NPCID of the creature Goldfish will turn into during a blood moon.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.BloodPenguin
member.summary: For Evil alts, the NPCID of the creature Penguins will turn into during a blood moon.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.MimicType
member.summary: For Evil and Hallow alts. The NPC ID to be spawned when placing a Key of Night or Light respectively in a chest.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.MimicKeyType
member.summary: For Evil and Hallow alts. The NPC ID to be spawned when placing a Key of Night or Light respectively in a chest.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.MechDropItemType
member.summary: For Hallow alts. The ItemID of the metal that the mechanical bosses will drop in place of Hallowed Bars.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.HammerType
member.summary: For Hallow alts. The ItemID of your biome's counterpart to the Pwnhammer, if it has one.

member.name: P:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.GERunnerConversion
member.summary: For Evil and Hallow alts. You may list additional tiles that this biome can convert into its own blocks during GERunner. The first value is the pure tile, the second value is its infected counterpart.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.SeedType
member.summary: For Evil Alts. The ItemID of the seeds that Eye of Cthulhu will drop in worlds with this biome.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.BiomeOreItem
member.summary: For Evil Alts. The ItemID of the ore that Eye of Cthulhu will drop in worlds with this biome.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.ArrowType
member.summary: For Evil Alts. In Corruption worlds, EoC will drop Unholy Arrows, which the Crimson has no equivalent for. If you have a comparable item you wish for EoC to drop, define it here.

member.name: P:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.IconSmall
member.summary: The path to the 30x30 texture of the small icon that will appear on the biome selection screen to represent this biome. This should typically be the same as the biome's main bestiary icon.

member.name: P:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.WorldIcon
member.summary: The path to the texture that will serve as one of the layers of the tree on the world selection screen.

member.name: P:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.OuterTexture
member.summary: For Evil biomes. The texture that appears around the loading bar on world creation.

member.name: P:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.LowerTexture
member.summary: For Underworld biomes. The texture that appears around the lower loading bar on world creation.

member.name: P:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.OuterColor
member.summary: For Evil biomes. The texture that appears inside the loading bar on world creation.

member.name: P:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.LowerColor
member.summary: For Underworld biomes. The texture that appears inside the lower loading bar on world creation.

member.name: P:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.NameColor
member.summary: The color of this biome's name that will appear on the biome selection menu.

member.name: P:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.Selectable
member.summary: Whether or not this biome will appear on the selection menu.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.BiomeFlesh
member.summary: In Remix worlds, sky islands generate as the world's Evil biome. Set this field to the TileID of the block that should replace flesh/lesion blocks if you are making an Evil alt.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.BiomeFleshWall
member.summary: In Remix worlds, sky islands generate as the world's Evil biome. Set this field to the TileID of the block that should replace flesh/lesion walls if you are making an Evil alt.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.FleshChestTile
member.summary: In Remix worlds, sky islands generate as the world's Evil biome. Set this field to the TileID of the block that should replace the flesh/lesion chest if you are making an Evil alt.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.FleshChestTileStyle
member.summary: In Remix worlds, sky islands generate as the world's Evil biome. Set this field to the style of the block that should replace the flesh/lesion chest if you are making an Evil alt.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.FleshTableTile
member.summary: In Remix worlds, sky islands generate as the world's Evil biome. Set this field to the TileID of the block that should replace the flesh/lesion table if you are making an Evil alt.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.FleshTableTileStyle
member.summary: In Remix worlds, sky islands generate as the world's Evil biome. Set this field to the style of the block that should replace the flesh/lesion table if you are making an Evil alt.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.FleshChairTile
member.summary: In Remix worlds, sky islands generate as the world's Evil biome. Set this field to the TileID of the block that should replace the flesh/lesion chair if you are making an Evil alt.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.FleshChairTileStyle
member.summary: In Remix worlds, sky islands generate as the world's Evil biome. Set this field to the style of the block that should replace the flesh/lesion chair if you are making an Evil alt.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.FleshDoorTile
member.summary: In Remix worlds, sky islands generate as the world's Evil biome. Set this field to the TileID of the block that should replace the flesh/lesion door if you are making an Evil alt.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.FleshDoorTileStyle
member.summary: In Remix worlds, sky islands generate as the world's Evil biome. Set this field to the style of the block that should replace the flesh/lesion door if you are making an Evil alt.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.FountainTile
member.summary: In CelebrationMk10 worlds, sky islands may generate as the world's Hallow biome, with a corresponding water fountain. Set this field to the TileID of your biome's water fountain if you are making a Hallow alt.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.FountainTileStyle
member.summary: If your Hallow alt's water fountain is part of a larger tilesheet, specify the style of the appropriate water fountain here.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.FountainActiveFrameX
member.summary: If your Hallow alt's water fountain is part of a larger tilesheet, specify the x frame of the appropriate active water fountain here.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.FountainActiveFrameY
member.summary: If your Hallow alt's water fountain is part of a larger tilesheet, specify the y frame of the appropriate active water fountain here.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.NoDeconversion
member.summary: If this is set to true, none of this biome's conversions will be reversed by purification powder or green solution

member.name: P:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.BiomeSightColor
member.summary: The color biome sight potions will highlight this biome's tiles in

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.ConvertTileAway(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Called before a tile is converted to a different biome Return false to prevent conversion

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.ConvertWallAway(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Called before a wall is converted to a different biome Return false to prevent conversion

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.CustomSelection(System.Collections.Generic.List{AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome})
member.summary: Override if you want custom selection

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.OnInitialize
member.summary: Override if you want to have random value whenever creating new world. Should be used just for custom tiers.

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome.OnClick
member.summary:
If you want custom action on click, then use this. Useful for "RandomX" options and custom tiers.
By default: false.
Set to true if you want to override default behavior.

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltMaterialContext.SetEvilOre(System.Int32)
member.summary:
For Evil alts.
Vanilla values: Demonite Ore, Crimtane Ore

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltMaterialContext.SetEvilBar(System.Int32)
member.summary:
For Evil alts.
Vanilla values: Demonite Bar, Crimtane Bar

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltMaterialContext.SetLightBar(System.Int32)
member.summary:
For Hallow alts.
Vanilla values: Hallowed Bar

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltMaterialContext.SetUnderworldBar(System.Int32)
member.summary:
For Underworld alts.
Vanilla values: Hellstone Bar

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltMaterialContext.SetTropicalBar(System.Int32)
member.summary:
For Jungle alts.
Vanilla values: Chlorophyte Bar

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltMaterialContext.SetMushroomBar(System.Int32)
member.summary:
For Jungle alts.
Vanilla values: Shroomite Bar

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltMaterialContext.SetEvilSword(System.Int32)
member.summary:
For Evil alts.
Vanilla values: Light's Bane, Blood Butcherer

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltMaterialContext.SetLightSword(System.Int32)
member.summary:
For Hallow alts.
Vanilla values: Excalibur

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltMaterialContext.SetUnderworldSword(System.Int32)
member.summary:
For Underworld alts.
Vanilla values: Fiery Greatsword

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltMaterialContext.SetTropicalSword(System.Int32)
member.summary:
For Jungle alts.
Vanilla values: Blade of Grass

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltMaterialContext.SetCombinationSword(System.Int32)
member.summary:
For Evil alts.
Vanilla values: Night's Edge

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltMaterialContext.SetTrueCombinationSword(System.Int32)
member.summary:
For Evil alts.
Vanilla values: True Night's Edge

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltMaterialContext.SetTrueLightSword(System.Int32)
member.summary:
For Hallow alts.
Vanilla values: True Excalibur

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltMaterialContext.SetVileInnard(System.Int32)
member.summary:
For Evil alts.
Vanilla values: Rotten Chunk, Vertebrae

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltMaterialContext.SetLightResidue(System.Int32)
member.summary:
For Hallow alts.
Vanilla values: Pixie Dust

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltMaterialContext.SetLightInnard(System.Int32)
member.summary:
For Hallow alts.
Vanilla values: Unicorn Horn

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltMaterialContext.SetLightComponent(System.Int32)
member.summary:
For Hallow alts.
Vanilla values: Crystal Shards

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltMaterialContext.SetVileComponent(System.Int32)
member.summary:
For Evil alts.
Vanilla values: Cursed Flame, Ichor

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltMaterialContext.SetEvilBossDrop(System.Int32)
member.summary:
For Evil alts.
Vanilla values: Shadow Scale, Tissue Sample

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltMaterialContext.SetTropicalComponent(System.Int32)
member.summary:
For Jungle alts.
Vanilla values: Jungle Spores

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltMaterialContext.SetEvilHerb(System.Int32)
member.summary:
For Evil alts.
Vanilla values: Deathweed

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltMaterialContext.SetUnderworldHerb(System.Int32)
member.summary:
For Underworld alts.
Vanilla values: Fireblossom

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltMaterialContext.SetTropicalHerb(System.Int32)
member.summary:
For Jungle alts.
Vanilla values: Moonglow

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltMaterialContext.SetUnderworldForge(System.Int32)
member.summary:
For Underworld alts.
Vanilla values: Hellforge

member.name: T:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.FishingLootPool`1
member.summary: Handles for the provided alt biome, otherwise the same as

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.GlobalBiome.PreConvertTile(AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome,AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Called before a tile is converted to a different biome Return false to prevent conversion

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.GlobalBiome.PostConvertTile(AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome,AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Called after a tile is converted

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.GlobalBiome.PreConvertWall(AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome,AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Called before a tile is converted to a different biome Return false to prevent conversion

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.GlobalBiome.PostConvertWall(AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome,AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Called after a tile is converted

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.GlobalBiomeHooks.PreConvertTile(AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome,AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Called before a tile is converted to a different biome Return false to prevent conversion

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.GlobalBiomeHooks.PostConvertTile(AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome,AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Called after a tile is converted

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.GlobalBiomeHooks.PreConvertWall(AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome,AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Called before a tile is converted to a different biome Return false to prevent conversion

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.GlobalBiomeHooks.PostConvertWall(AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome,AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Called after a tile is converted

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltOres.AltOre.ore
member.summary: The TileID of the ore that will generate in the world.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltOres.AltOre.oreItem
member.summary: The ItemID of the ore.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltOres.AltOre.bar
member.summary: The ItemID of the bar that will generate as chest loot.

member.name: F:AltLibrary.Common.AltOres.AltOre.Selectable
member.summary: Whether or not this ore will appear on the selection menu.

member.name: P:AltLibrary.Common.AltOres.AltOre.NameColor
member.summary: The color of this ore's name that will appear on the biome selection menu.

member.name: P:AltLibrary.Common.AltOres.AltOre.OreSlot
member.summary: Tells the Library what ore this is an alternative to

member.name: P:AltLibrary.Common.AltOres.AltOre.DisplayName
member.summary: The name of this ore that will display on the biome selection screen.

member.name: P:AltLibrary.Common.AltOres.AltOre.Description
member.summary: The description for this ore that will appear on the biome selection screen.

member.name: P:AltLibrary.Common.AltOres.AltOre.GuideHelpText
member.summary: Used for adamantite ore alts.

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.AltOres.AltOre.OnInitialize
member.summary: Override if you want to have random value whenever creating new world. Should be used just for custom tiers.

member.name: P:AltLibrary.Common.AltOres.OreSlot.DisplayName
member.summary: The name of this ore that will display on the biome selection screen.

member.name: P:AltLibrary.Common.AltOres.OreSlot.FallbackOre
member.summary: Used for unloaded ores

member.name: P:AltLibrary.Common.Hooks.HardmodeWorldGen.ShouldConvertBeeTiles
member.summary: In Not the bees! worlds, hive and crispy honey blocks are replaced with Stone and Hardened Sand equivalents respectively

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Common.Hooks.WorldIcons.LayeredIcons(Terraria.IO.WorldFileData,Terraria.GameContent.UI.Elements.UIImage@,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,AltLibrary.AltLibraryConfig.WorldDataValues},System.String)
member.summary: For drunk icons

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Core.ALConvert.SimulateThrownWater(Terraria.Projectile,System.String)
member.summary: Makes throwing water converting effect.

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Core.ALConvert.SimulateThrownWater(Terraria.Projectile,Terraria.ModLoader.Mod,System.String)
member.summary: Makes throwing water converting effect.

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Core.ALConvert.SimulateThrownWater``1(Terraria.Projectile)
member.summary: Makes throwing water converting effect.

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Core.ALConvert.SimulateThrownWater(Terraria.Projectile,AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome)
member.summary: Makes throwing water converting effect.

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Core.ALConvert.SimulateSolution(Terraria.Projectile,Terraria.ModLoader.Mod,System.String)
member.summary: Makes solution converting effect.

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Core.ALConvert.SimulateSolution(Terraria.Projectile,System.String)
member.summary: Makes solution converting effect.

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Core.ALConvert.SimulateSolution``1(Terraria.Projectile)
member.summary: Makes solution converting effect.

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Core.ALConvert.SimulateSolution(Terraria.Projectile,AltLibrary.Common.AltBiomes.AltBiome)
member.summary: Makes solution converting effect.

member.name: P:AltLibrary.Core.Generation.EvilBiomeGenerationPass.EdgeGivePercent
member.summary: The amount of this biome's area in which other evil biomes generating will be disincentivized rather than outright prohibited

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Core.Generation.EvilBiomeGenerationPass.PostGenerateEvil
member.summary: Use this if you need to do stuff after spawning all chasms.

member.name: M:AltLibrary.Core.Generation.EvilBiomeGenerationPass.GetEvilSpawnLocation(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32@,System.Int32@,System.Int32@)
member.summary:
Call this method if you somehow need to know a valid evil spawn location.
This is automatically called when generating the world.
This is a very long function. Please do not overwrite this unless you absolutely know what you are doing.
